name: Shinobu Foods Products Co., Ltd.
summary: Shinobu Foods Products Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells cooked rice foods in Japan. The company processed food products include lunch boxes, rice balls, sushi, etc.; and cooked bread products, such as sandwiches, etc., as well as provides side dishes, etc. Shinobu Foods Products Co., Ltd. was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
